kind: fix-round exercise (goal-based loop — Gate A red on pre-existing lint, the loop must repair it)
prompt: Add a `square(a)` function to src/mathUtils.mjs that returns a*a, and export it. Add a test for it in test/mathUtils.test.mjs following the style of the existing tests. IMPORTANT: do NOT modify or refactor ANY existing code — only add the new function and its test.
expect: The implement phase adds square() but leaves the seeded `var` in double() (it was told not to touch existing code) -> Gate A RED on lint -> the WRAPPER-owned fix-round loop feeds the exact lint failure to a fix agent -> var becomes let/const -> full Gate A green. PASS requires gate green AND at least 1 fix round actually used (proves the loop ran, not a lucky first pass).
